title: erigeron pseuderiocephalus
intro: Erigeron pseuderiocephalus, also known as the falseflower fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Erigeron pseuderiocephalus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve menstrual cramps, and reduce fever. Erigeron pseuderiocephalus can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
